title: BEWOS Black Teaspoons, 24 Pieces, Stainless Steel, 5.56 Inches (14.1 Cm), Mirror Polished, Dishwasher Safe, Coffee & Latte Spoons for Household & Restaurant
features: 【Sufficient Quantity and Various Uses】The black tea spoon contains 24, more than 16, which can be used as a party stockpile and perfectly replace the teaspoon that are lost in daily life. It is the perfect addition to tea time and an indispensable tool for parties and gatherings.

【Stainless Steel and Durable】Made from food-safe stainless steel, these 14.1 cm long matte black coffee spoon are a durable set that will last for many years. The tea spoons set of 24 are also rust and corrosion resistant, which ensures the health of the food.

【Ergonomic and Dishwasher Safe】The tea spoons 24 stainless steel are ergonomically designed and highly polished with smooth edges, which have no rough spots, so they can not hurt you. Best of all, it is dishwasher safe and a great alternative to plastic spoons.

【Classic & Elegant Design】The small matt black spoons have been carefully designed to add more elegance to your table. Our teaspoons have a classic and clear design that can be matched with your existing cutlery sets to enhance the dining experience.

【Customer Service】You can ask all questions through clicking the "Customer Questions and Answers". We are pleased to help you learn more about our table spoons. In addition, please feel free to contact us if something is wrong. Our service team will give you a 100% satisfactory answer within 24 hours.
description: Product Description If you're looking for matte black tea spoons that last for years, the BEWOS teaspoons cutlery is a must have for you! The spoons are made of high-quality stainless steel, which makes them sturdy and durable. In addition, the classic design and elegant style of the latte spoons is enough to fit all your existing tableware. These black mini spoons are perfect for everyday use, hotels, restaurants, banquets and more. High quality The dessert spoons are made of high quality stainless steel, highly polished, rust-resistant, lead-free and nickel-free, which will be a good companion for your dinner plates. .Ergonomic The teaspoons are ergonomically shaped with a rounded handle that adapt to the posture of the hand, which is more comfortable to hold. Classic design Our durable matt black tea spoons have a classic and clear design that looks gorgeous and matches perfectly with your existing cutlery to enhance the dining experience. Please note: Please wash these black spoons before first use. After use, please wash and dry them completely to ensure their durability. Please do not scratch the tea spoon with a iron wire to keep the surface smooth.Dishwasher safe, you can wash the cutlery in the dishwasher.
